mainEntity.text: Client perspective: How to find ChatGPT-recommended lawyers in NY?

acceptedAnswer.text: Ask ChatGPT 'best New York [case type] lawyer' and verify via NY bar, reviews; top 3 often match Justia leaders.

suggestedAnswer.text: Follow up with calls. Useful starter, not final.
